tracks.meaning: to transmit a television or radio program to a wide audience simultaneously
to send out or disseminate information, data, or signals over a wide area or network
to sow seeds over a wide area by scattering them rather than planting in rows
to scatter or spread something widely over an area
to announce or publicize something to a large number of people or organizations
to make something widely known or publicly announce it
to send a data packet or message to all devices on a network simultaneously
the width or span of something, particularly the spread of a bird's wings or a vehicle's axles
